---
title: "Review Centile Tests"
output: html_document
date: "2024-10-10"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
setwd("/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Margaret/sex_mod_braincharts")
```

```{r, warning=FALSE}}
if(!require('pacman')) {
  install.packages('pacman')
}
pacman::p_load(data.table, ggplot2, tidyverse, stats, skimr, rlang, ggrepel, gamlss, ggseg, ggsegExtra, RESI, paletteer, patchwork, plotly, pracma, gcplyr, legendry, gghighlight, forcats)

#devtools::install_github("BGDlab/gamlssTools", force=TRUE)
library(gamlssTools)

sa_list <- readRDS("./pheno_lists/cortical_surf.rds")
ct_list <- readRDS("./pheno_lists/cortical_thickness.rds")
vol_list <- readRDS("./pheno_lists/cortical_vols.rds")
global_list <- readRDS("./pheno_lists/global_vols.rds")
sub_list <- readRDS("./pheno_lists/subcortical_vols.rds")
pheno_list <- c(sa_list, ct_list, vol_list, global_list, sub_list)
test_path <- "/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Margaret/sex_mod_braincharts/cv_sample_?_test/*/"

# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("BGDlab/ggsegTissue")
library(ggsegTissue)
#remotes::install_github("ggseg/ggsegExtra")
```

#Read & Prep CSVs

centiles

```{r}
# Use Sys.glob to expand wildcard paths
paths <- Sys.glob(file.path(test_path, "cent_csvs/*cent.csv"))

# Read all matching CSVs
cent_df_list <- lapply(paths, function(p) {
  fread(p) %>%
    mutate(
      cv_sample = stringr::str_extract(p, "(?<=cv_sample_)[A-Za-z]+(?=_test)"),
      total     = stringr::str_extract(p, "(?<=total)(TRUE|FALSE)"),
      weighted  = stringr::str_detect(p, "weight")
    )
})


length(cent_df_list)
#stringr::str_extract(paths, "(?<=cv_sample_)[A-Za-z]+(?=_test)")
```

Look at samples retained

```{r}
get_demos <- function(df){
  demo <- df %>%
    group_by(dx_recode) %>%
    mutate(age_years=(un_log(logAge_days)-280)/265.25) %>%
    summarise(n = n(),
              n_female = sum(sex=="F"),
              min_age = min(age_years),
              mean_age = mean(age_years),
              sd_age = sd(age_years),
              max_age = max(age_years)
              )
  demo$total <- unique(df$total)
  demo$cv_sample <- unique(df$cv_sample)
  demo$weighted <- unique(df$weighted)
  return(demo)
}

cent_df_demos <- lapply(cent_df_list, get_demos)
```

Test results
```{r}
# Use Sys.glob to expand wildcard paths
paths <- Sys.glob(file.path(test_path, "cent_csvs/*cent_pt*_test.csv"))

# Read all matching CSVs
output_fread <- lapply(paths, fread)
length(output_fread)
names(output_fread) <- paths
#stringr::str_extract(paths, "(?<=cv_sample_)[A-Za-z]+(?=_test)")


cent_test.df <- bind_rows(output_fread, .id="file") %>%
  mutate(pheno = stringr::str_extract(basename(file), "^[^_]+"),
        cv_sample = stringr::str_extract(file, "(?<=cv_sample_)[A-Za-z]+(?=_test)"),
         total = stringr::str_extract(file, "(?<=total)(TRUE|FALSE)"),
         weighted  = stringr::str_detect(file, "weight")) %>%
  select(!file) %>%
  group_by(total, weighted, cv_sample) %>% #apply FDR correction within each combo
  mutate(
    dx_p.val_fdr = p.adjust(
      case.control_p.val,
      method = "fdr"
    ),
    pt.sex_p.val_fdr = p.adjust(
      pt.sex_p.val,
      method = "fdr"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(dx_sig_fdr = ifelse(dx_p.val_fdr <=0.05, TRUE, FALSE),
         pt.sex_sig_fdr = ifelse(pt.sex_p.val <=0.05, TRUE, FALSE))
```

clean up

## Non TBV-Corrected

```{r}
#full model
cent_test.df_uncor <- cent_test.df %>%
  filter(total == "FALSE" & weighted == "FALSE")

cent_test.df_uncor %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_bar(aes(x=dx, fill=dx_sig_fdr)) +
  facet_grid(model~cv_sample)

cent_test.df_uncor %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_bar(aes(x=dx, fill=pt.sex_sig_fdr)) +
  facet_grid(model~cv_sample)

cent_test.df_uncor %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_bar(aes(x=pheno, fill=cv_sample)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)) +
  facet_grid(model~dx) +
  gghighlight(dx_sig_fdr == TRUE, calculate_per_facet = TRUE, unhighlighted_params = list(fill = NULL, alpha = 0.3))
```


```{r}
skim(cent.df)

cent.df %>%
  filter(dx_recode=="CN") %>%
  skim()

cent.df %>%
  filter(dx_recode!="CN") %>%
  skim()
```

## TBV-Corrected

```{r}
#full model
cent_test.df_tbv <- cent_test.df %>%
  filter(total == "TRUE" & weighted == "FALSE")

cent_test.df_tbv %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_bar(aes(x=dx, fill=dx_sig_fdr)) +
  facet_grid(model~cv_sample)

cent_test.df_tbv %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_bar(aes(x=dx, fill=pt.sex_sig_fdr)) +
  facet_grid(model~cv_sample)

cent_test.df_tbv %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_bar(aes(x=pheno, fill=cv_sample)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)) +
  facet_grid(model~dx) +
  gghighlight(dx_sig_fdr == TRUE, calculate_per_facet = TRUE, unhighlighted_params = list(fill = NULL, alpha = 0.3))
```
